name: Storage Bag with Wheels Pewter Aqua - Brightroom™
description:
Maximize your storage space with the help of this Storage Bag with Wheels from Brightroom™. This storage bag features a zipper closure for easy access, while the handles and spinner wheels allow easy maneuverability. With a capacity of 7360 cubic inches, this storage bag in a pewter aqua hue is great for storing your blankets, throw pillows and more. Best of all, it's collapsible for easy storage when not in use.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
